Metadata.title: Ich bin ein Berwiener
Metadata.description: A dachshund walk through Berlin — celebrating 10 years of Doggy Bag Tours.

HomePage.freeEventMessage: No registration required. Just show up and join the walk.

AboutPage.title: The Longest Little Dog Walk
AboutPage.paragraph1: To celebrate the 10th anniversary of Doggy Bag Tours, we invite Berlin's dachshunds to join us for a walk through the heart of the city.
AboutPage.paragraph2: Dachshunds are our guests of honour. But this walk is open to everyone: dachshunds, other dogs, dog lovers, Berliners and visitors alike.
AboutPage.paragraph3: Anyone who identifies as a dachshund will be officially recognised as a dachshund for the day.
AboutPage.paragraph4: If there is a little dachshund somewhere deep inside your heart, then this is exactly where you belong.

WhenPage.title: When
WhenPage.practical1: No registration required. Just show up and join the walk.
WhenPage.practical2: Bring your dachshund, your dog, or simply yourself.
WhenPage.practical3: Comfortable shoes recommended. The route follows public paths through central Berlin.

WhoPage.title: Who?
WhoPage.murphyImageAlt: Murphy, the Doggy Bag Tours mascot
WhoPage.murphyParagraph1: Murphy is an extraordinary East German Dachshund and the official mascot of Doggy Bag Tours.
WhoPage.murphyParagraph2: She was named after one of our favourite singers, Roisín Murphy, and has been part of the company almost from the beginning. Over the years, she has welcomed guests, inspected bicycles, supervised tour guides and perfected the art of doing absolutely nothing while looking very busy.
WhoPage.murphyParagraph3: Murphy's spirit lives in our name and our tone: warm, a little cheeky, and never taking ourselves too seriously. Berlin's history is serious enough; Murphy reminds us that exploring the city can still be fun.
WhoPage.murphyParagraph4: In 2026, Murphy turns ten years old. To celebrate her birthday and the 10th anniversary of Doggy Bag Tours, she has invited Berlin's dachshunds — and anyone with a dachshund somewhere deep inside their heart — to join the longest little dog walk through the city.
WhoPage.magnusImageAlt: Magnus, the Doggy Bag Tours greeter
WhoPage.magnusParagraph1: Magnus is a Dutch dachshund who has been welcoming guests at our starting location since 2022 and is always happy to receive a scratch on the head.
WhoPage.magnusParagraph2: He is named after Magnus Hirschfeld, the German physician, sexologist and LGBTQ+ advocate whose pioneering work during the Weimar Republic helped promote understanding and equality for LGBTQ+ people.
WhoPage.magnusParagraph3: Today, Magnus continues that welcoming spirit by greeting visitors from around the world before they set off to explore Berlin.
WhoPage.paragraph1: Dachshunds are the guests of honour. This walk is open to:
WhoPage.invite5: Anyone who identifies as a dachshund
WhoPage.paragraph2: No registration required. Just show up and join the walk.
WhoPage.awardsIntro: Murphy's personal favourites — four prizes for the most memorable dachshunds of the day.

WalkPage.title: Doggy Bag Tours
WalkPage.paragraph1: Doggy Bag Tours offers bike tours through Berlin — guided rides that bring the city's history, culture and hidden corners to life.
WalkPage.paragraph2: Ich bin ein Berwiener exists because of Doggy Bag Tours. This dachshund walk celebrates everything the company stands for: Berlin, stories, community — and dogs.
WalkPage.paragraph3: The walk marks the 10th anniversary of Doggy Bag Tours — ten years of showing Berlin to visitors and locals alike, often with a dachshund along for the ride.

MurphyPage.title: Murphy
MurphyPage.description: A dedicated space for the unexpected around the event.

CommunityPage.title: Community
CommunityPage.description: Join in, connect, and become part of the Berwiener community.
CommunityPage.acrossWorldIntro: On 21 June 2026, dachshunds and dachshund lovers around the world will celebrate World Dachshund Day. Berlin is just one stop on a much larger journey.
CommunityPage.acrossWorldFuture: More international dachshund events will be added here.
CommunityPage.acrossWorldNote: Know another dachshund walk or dachshund gathering? Let us know and we'll add it to the map.

ShopPage.title: Shop
ShopPage.description: Merchandise and event materials will be available here.

Footer.tagline: A dachshund walk in Berlin — celebrating 10 years of Doggy Bag Tours.
